notes: Initial training — Stage A only. 201 test samples (30 no_person + 171 person), 0 errors.

description: Attribute detection (6 classes: grief, hair, happy, multiple, no_hair, sad)
notes: First Stage B training. 168 test samples, 2 errors. Accuracy: 98.81%.

description: 5-person face recognition (Colin Powell, Donald Rumsfeld, George W Bush, Gerhard Schroeder, Tony Blair)
notes: Retrained Stage B as 5-person recognizer. 152 test samples, 22 errors. Accuracy: 85.52%.

description: Person detection only — Stage B removed. Retrained on balanced dataset (500 person + 500 no_person).
notes: Switched to detection-only system. Balanced dataset 500+500. INT8 quantized model 17.52 KB.

description: Improved real-world robustness — 1000 diverse LFW faces + 500 synthetic + 500 CIFAR-10 real backgrounds. Augmentation: blur, extreme brightness, partial occlusion. 6 augmented copies per image.
notes: 9800 training samples (was ~2800). Test set 300 samples (150 per class). All correct. Model size unchanged at 17.52 KB.

description: Deeper diversity — 1400 person (1000 LFW + 400 Olivetti AT&T) + 1500 no_person (500 synthetic + 1000 CIFAR-10). 14,210 augmented training samples.
notes: 14210 training samples (was 9800). 2900 raw images (was 1500). Test set 435 samples. 1 error (99.77%). INT8 validation 100% on 100 samples. Model size 17.55 KB.

description: Aggressive real-world augmentation — 1400 person (1000 LFW + 400 Olivetti) + 2500 no_person (500 synthetic + 2000 CIFAR-10). New: motion blur, backlight simulation. Higher augmentation rates + 8 copies per image. 24,570 training samples.
notes: 24570 training samples (was 14210). 3900 raw images (was 2900). Test set 585 samples. 1 error (99.83%). INT8 validation 100% on 100 samples. Model size 17.55 KB.
